evidence: Identified xlsx + canvas-design; also surfaced data-visualization, data-analyst, big-data-analysis ✅
Detailed explanation per skill with trigger keyword reasoning ✅
Engine ran cleanly, returned structured JSON result ✅
with_skill.notes: Bonus: engine auto-generated auto-canvas-design when canvas-design was missing. Gap noted: data-visualization not in keyword_map.

evidence: Explained each skill's role in the pipeline ✅
without_skill.notes: Without skill: broader but less structured. No auto-generation, no local skill check.
